notes: Solid, complete Snake implementation with queued input, speed scaling, hi-score persistence, win condition, and death flash; minor issue is the level display showing negative values at start (tickRate-8 starts at 0) and the tail-collision edge-case workaround is slightly hacky but functional.

Exceptional implementation with perfect core logic (including tail-chasing edge cases), great visual polish, and sound effects; only minor deductions for single-input queueing and lack of try/catch around localStorage.

Solid and complete Snake with scoring, growth, collision, pause, and restart, but strict scoring is reduced for minor UX/control issues like title/restart prompts ignoring Space despite partial support and non-essential code quirks.
